scenes.text: Hook text — first 3 seconds grab attention
scenes.description: Visual description of the hook scene

scenes.text: Problem statement — why does the viewer need this?
scenes.description: Visual showing the problem or pain point

scenes.text: CTA — shop now, link in bio, etc.
scenes.description: Product lineup, logo, or website URL

voiceover_script: Full voiceover script goes here. Write it as natural speech — the way someone would actually talk about the product.

_footage_source_types.veo:<prompt>: Generate AI footage with Veo (agent handles via generate_video_safe.sh)
_footage_source_types.gdrive:<id_or_url>: Download from Google Drive (OAuth primary, yt-dlp fallback for public links)
_footage_source_types.clip:<filename>@<start>-<end>: Time range from a cataloged clip (use analyze-footage to build catalog)
